name: MonkeyLearn
description: MonkeyLearn — No-code text analysis platform for classification, extraction, and sentiment analysis via API.

seo.title: MonkeyLearn — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: MonkeyLearn: MonkeyLearn — No-code text analysis platform for classification, extraction, and sentiment analysis via API.

when_to_use: Training custom text classifiers for support ticket routing
Extracting keywords and entities from customer feedback at scale
Building no-code NLP pipelines for business analysts
Automating tagging of product reviews with sentiment and topic

pros: Simple REST API for text classification
Pre-trained models for sentiment and topic
No-code UI for training custom classifiers
cons: Outperformed by modern LLMs for most NLP tasks
Pricing model feels dated in LLM era
review.verdict: Legacy NLP API; for new projects an LLM with a prompt usually beats MonkeyLearn on quality and flexibility.
review.best_for: Teams already invested with stable legacy classification pipelines
review.not_for: Greenfield projects choosing between LLM-based and classic NLP APIs
